prompt:
Architectural visualization exterior render (intended use).
Scene: golden-hour outdoor setting, sky in peach-to-pale-blue gradient, warm low sun raking from the right casting long soft shadows.
Subject: a modern minimalist two-story house, photorealistic architectural render.
Key details: clean exposed concrete and warm wood facade, floor-to-ceiling glazing revealing softly lit interior, flat roof with subtle overhang, integrated garage on the left, a thin reflection pool along the front, low manicured grass, a single mature olive tree, smooth concrete path in the foreground, sharp material rendering.
Constraints: no people, no cars, no watermark, no extra text, no logos.
